case_title: MICHELE L. MCGILL VS. THOMAS H. ROBERTS

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-19-2014 CONTINUED TO MAR-18-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCGILL, MICHELE L. AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTS, THOMAS H. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-19-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-18-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-27-2014
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTS, THOMAS H.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-18-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCGILL, MICHELE L. AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTS, THOMAS H.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCGILL, MICHELE L. AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTS, THOMAS H.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR (JUDGMENT FOR PLTF PURSUANT TO DEFTS' CONFESSION) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCGILL, MICHELE L. AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTS, THOMAS H.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCGILL, MICHELE L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBERTS, THOMAS H. $111,482.44 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $111,482.44, TOGETHER WITH INTEREST THEREON AT THE LEGAL RATE OF TEN (10)PERCENT (CONFESSION JUDGMENT)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCGILL, MICHELE L. SERVED JUL-22-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTS, THOMAS H.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCGILL, MICHELE L. AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTS, THOMAS H.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCGILL, MICHELE L. ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 DAYS
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF MCGILL, MICHELE L. AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTS, THOMAS H.
CONFESSION OF JUDGMNT; CERTIFICATE OF ATTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCGILL, MICHELE L.
